ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "readme" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the model */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the model version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "readme" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the version */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the run belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training run */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training run */,
  "trn_loss" REAL /* Training loss of the run */,
  "val_loss" REAL /* Validation loss of the run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training run was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the training run (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing the hyperparameters used for the training run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the training run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run the metric belongs to */,
  "val_rel_err" REAL /* Validation relative error */,
  "val_rel_err_o" REAL /* Validation relative error (optimized) */,
  "val_rel_err_h" REAL /* Validation relative error (hardware) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation metric was last updated */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing additional validation metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the model */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance summary */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the summary belongs to */,
  "trn_loss_mean" REAL /* Mean training loss */,
  "val_loss_mean" REAL /* Mean validation loss */,
  "val_rel_err_mean" REAL /* Mean validation relative error */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance summary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance summary was last updated */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing additional performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
